Require Import
  HoTT.Classes.implementations.peano_naturals
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.abstract_algebra
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.naturals
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.orders
  HoTT.Classes.implementations.natpair_integers
  HoTT.Classes.theory.rings
  HoTT.Classes.theory.integers.
Generalizable Variables N Z R f.

(* Add Ring Z : (rings.stdlib_ring_theory Z). *)
(* Add Ring nat : (rings.stdlib_semiring_theory nat). *)

Lemma induction
  (P: Z -> Type):
  P 0 -> (forall n, 0 ≤ n -> P n -> P (1 + n)) -> (forall n, n ≤ 0 -> P n -> P (n - 1)) ->
  forall n, P n.

goals.conclusion:
P 0 ->
(forall n : Z, 0 ≤ n -> P n -> P (1 + n)) ->
(forall n : Z, n ≤ 0 -> P n -> P (n - 1)) -> forall n : Z, P n

P 0 ->
(forall n : Z, 0 ≤ n -> P n -> P (1 + n)) ->
(forall n : Z, n ≤ 0 -> P n -> P (n - 1)) -> forall n : Z, P n

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : Z, 0 ≤ n0 -> P n0 -> P (1 + n0)
forall n0 : Z, n0 ≤ 0 -> P n0 -> P (n0 - 1)

contents: destruct (int_abs_sig Z nat n) as [[a A]|[a A]].

Lemma induction_nonneg
  (P: Z -> Type):
  P 0 -> (forall n, 0 ≤ n -> P n -> P (1 + n)) -> forall n, 0 ≤ n -> P n.

goals.conclusion:
P 0 ->
(forall n : Z, 0 ≤ n -> P n -> P (1 + n)) -> forall n : Z, 0 ≤ n -> P n

forall n : Z, 0 ≤ n -> P n

contents: #[export] Instance slow_int_le_dec : forall x y: Z, Decidable (x ≤ y) | 10.

goals.conclusion: forall x y : Z, Decidable (x ≤ y)
forall x y : Z, Decidable (x ≤ y)

contents:
(* otherwise Z_le gets defined using peano.nat_ring
   but we only know order_reflecting when using naturals.nat_ring *)

destruct (dec (integers_to_ring _ (NatPair.Z nat) x ≤
    integers_to_ring _ (NatPair.Z nat) y)) as [E|E].

hypotheses.type: integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) x ≤ integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) y

~
(integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) x ≤ integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) y)
integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) x ≤ integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) y

~
(integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) x ≤ integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) y)

~
(integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) x ≤ integers_to_ring Z (NatPair.Z nat) y)
